title: Lake of the Woods Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative  - Canada.ca
content:
## Lake of the Woods Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative
Protecting the waters of Lake of the Woods through a Freshwater Action Plan.
- Canada takes action to address harmful algae blooms and protect Lake of the Woods
- EOLakeWatch: Interactive algal bloom monitoring tool

## Services and information
Summary of issues facing Lake of the Woods, contact information.
The key issues affecting aquatic ecosystem health.

### Goals and priorities
Working with partners through the Freshwater Action Plan.
Funding for protecting the waters of Lake of the Woods.
Projects funded under the Lake of the Woods Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative.

Thank you for your feedback.
